ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "baseline_a1c" REAL /* Baseline A1C percentage of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters or inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms or pounds */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., Placebo, Sitagliptin 100 mg once daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between patient and treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment for the patient */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment for the patient */,
  "a1c_change" REAL /* Change in A1C percentage from baseline */,
  "achieved_a1c_below_7" INTEGER /* Whether the patient achieved A1C below 7% */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "a1c_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A1C record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the A1C measurement was taken */,
  "a1c_percentage" REAL /* A1C percentage measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure A1C levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_a1c_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within their institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
